title: BEM-796 dispatch state
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:21 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
txt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
processor_present='scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh' in txt
commit_present='scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh' in txt
queue=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
if results:
    status='dispatch_results_exist_parse_next'; next_action='parse dispatch result statuses and patch exact failure'
elif processor_present and commit_present:
    status='processor_present_but_no_results'; next_action='verify codex-runner step placement and lint; processor may not execute or commit may fail'
elif processor_present:
    status='processor_present_commit_missing'; next_action='install commit step for dispatch results'
else:
    status='processor_missing'; next_action='install processor in codex-runner'
state={'bem':'BEM-796','status':status,'processor_present':processor_present,'commit_present':commit_present,'queue_count':len(queue),'queue_tail':queue[-10:],'result_count':len(results),'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem796_diagnose_dispatch_processor_state.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem796_diagnose_dispatch_processor_state.md').write_text('# BEM-796 | Diagnose Dispatch Processor State | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem796_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-796'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem796_diagnose_dispatch_processor_state.json','governance/reports/bem796_diagnose_dispatch_processor_state.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem796_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed codex-runner dispatch processor presence, queue items, result files, and Claude runtime state')
